testcases.description: Verify if user able to launch the URL
testcases.raw: TC_01CLIC ComponentUI and FunctionalityVerify if user able to launch the URL Launch the Studio URL "https://qapartnerportal.kitaboo. com/reader/CL-ELA-master/#/login"Studio Listing page should display

testcases.description: Verify if user ia able to create math activity
testcases.expected: Create activity by entering basic infoActivity creation page should display with Basic info screen
testcases.raw: TC_02CLIC Component Functionality Verify if user ia able to create math activity 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Click on "create new" 3.Click on math 4. Create activity by entering basic infoActivity creation page should display with Basic info screen

testcases.description: Verify if user is able to start authoring
testcases.expected: Click on start authoringShould redirect to New authoring page
testcases.raw: TC_03CLIC Component FunctionalityVerify if user is able to start authoring 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Click on "create new" 3.Click on math 4. Create activity by entering basic info 5. Click on start authoringShould redirect to New authoring page

testcases.description: Verify CLIC Identifier is retained after activity is saved
testcases.expected: Save the activityCLIC Identifier is saved and retained in authoring data
testcases.raw: TC_24CLIC ComponentFunctional Verify CLIC Identifier is retained after activity is saved 1. Create new activity → Add generic step2. Drag and drop CLIC Component3. Enter CLIC Identifier4. Save the activityCLIC Identifier is saved and retained in authoring data

testcases.description: Verify CLIC Component auto-launches on activity re-open
testcases.expected: Reopen the same activity in authoring CLIC Component is shown automatically with previously entered Identifier populated
testcases.raw: TC_25CLIC ComponentFunctional Verify CLIC Component auto-launches on activity re-open 1. Close the saved activity2. Reopen the same activity in authoring CLIC Component is shown automatically with previously entered Identifier populated

testcases.description: Verify no prompt is displayed again for CLIC Identifier after relaunchFollow TC_CLIC_22 steps CLIC Identifier input fields should not be shown again unless explicitly edited
testcases.raw: TC_26CLIC ComponentFunctional Verify no prompt is displayed again for CLIC Identifier after relaunchFollow TC_CLIC_22 steps CLIC Identifier input fields should not be shown again unless explicitly edited

testcases.description: Verify CLIC Component persists even after author logs out and logs back in
testcases.expected: Open saved activity CLIC Component launches with previously entered data without prompting again
testcases.raw: TC_27CLIC ComponentRegression Verify CLIC Component persists even after author logs out and logs back in 1. Save activity with CLIC Identifier2. Log out and log in again3. Open saved activity CLIC Component launches with previously entered data without prompting again

testcases.description: Verify that editing the CLIC Identifier updates the value and persists across relaunch
testcases.expected: Reopen the activityUpdated CLIC Identifier is displayed and used in auto-launch
testcases.raw: TC_28CLIC ComponentFunctional Verify that editing the CLIC Identifier updates the value and persists across relaunch 1. Edit CLIC Identifier field → Save → Close activity2. Reopen the activityUpdated CLIC Identifier is displayed and used in auto-launch

testcases.description: Verify CLIC Component launches automatically in Preview mode with saved Identifier
testcases.expected: Preview activity CLIC component loads and functions based on stored Identifier
testcases.raw: TC_29CLIC ComponentFunctional Verify CLIC Component launches automatically in Preview mode with saved Identifier 1. Save activity after entering CLIC Identifier2. Preview activity CLIC component loads and functions based on stored Identifier

testcases.description: Verify CLIC Component doesn’t launch if Identifier wasn’t entered before saving
testcases.expected: Save and reopen activity CLIC Component remains inactive or prompts for missing Identifier
testcases.raw: TC_30CLIC ComponentFunctional Verify CLIC Component doesn’t launch if Identifier wasn’t entered before saving 1. Add CLIC without entering Identifier2. Save and reopen activity CLIC Component remains inactive or prompts for missing Identifier

testcases.description: Verify CLIC Component handles multiple CLIC instances with different Identifiers properly across relaunches
testcases.expected: Save and reopen activity Each CLIC Component is loaded with correct and previously saved Identifier
testcases.raw: TC_31CLIC ComponentFunctional Verify CLIC Component handles multiple CLIC instances with different Identifiers properly across relaunches 1. Add 2+ CLIC Components with unique Identifiers2. Save and reopen activity Each CLIC Component is loaded with correct and previously saved Identifier

testcases.description: Verify no data loss occurs during relaunch with previously saved CLIC Component
testcases.expected: Save, close, reopenAll data including CLIC is intact
testcases.raw: TC_32CLIC ComponentFunctional Verify no data loss occurs during relaunch with previously saved CLIC Component 1. Add CLIC + Identifier2. Add extra content (e.g., MTP, Text)3. Save, close, reopenAll data including CLIC is intact

testcases.description: Verify activity with saved CLIC launches in CLP with correct behavior and Identifier reflected
testcases.expected: Launch in CLP as teacher/student CLIC component appears as expected, correctly tied to the stored Identifier
testcases.raw: TC_33CLIC ComponentFunctional Verify activity with saved CLIC launches in CLP with correct behavior and Identifier reflected 1. Add CLIC + Identifier2. Save + Publish3. Launch in CLP as teacher/student CLIC component appears as expected, correctly tied to the stored Identifier
